'''Tra'Parr'Sratt''' was a [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] warrior who worked for the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Abdi-Badawzi]]. He was a close friend of [[Kaine Paulsen]]. When Kaine's wife was [[Death/Legends|dying]], Tra'Parr'Sratt helped deliver Kaine's son, [[Drake Paulsen|Drake]], whom he dubbed Lom, as a Coynite term of endearment.
